name: number_insight_advanced_get
description: Get advanced real-time information about a phone number including reachability, validity score, roaming status, and IP match. Most comprehensive lookup.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The phone number to look up in international format.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: 2-letter country code if number is in national format.

parameters.name: cnam
parameters.description: Include caller name (CNAM) data for US numbers. Default false.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address of the user for IP-match scoring.

parameters.name: real_time_data
parameters.description: Include real-time reachability data. Default true.
